project.title: Crie veinte anos a esa nina. Su madre volvio - Parte 5 (final)
project.subtitle: Veinte lineas
project.hook: Empaque treinta anos de tela en cuatro cajas.

traje_boda.prompt: Same character Jeong-hui, same face and short black hair now neatly set, a plain well-cut dark green dress with a small brooch at the collar, no reading glasses, standing upright, both hands holding a small worn notebook against her chest, calm unshakeable expression, neutral studio background.

sentada_fila.prompt: Same character Jeong-hui, same face and set hair, same plain dark green dress and brooch, seated on an upholstered banquet chair, upright posture, both hands resting on the small notebook in her lap, feet flat on the floor, composed expression, neutral studio background.

novia_vestido.prompt: Same character Da-yeong, same face with the small mole under one eye, long dark brown hair pinned up with small white flowers, the finished simple white wedding dress with the neatly sewn hem, standing upright, both hands holding a small bouquet at her waist, decided steady expression, neutral studio background.

vestido_boda.prompt: Same character Ji-ah, same narrow face with the same small mole under one eye, dark hair in a smooth low bun, a modest navy dress without the camel coat, standing upright, both hands empty and open at her sides, frightened resolved expression, neutral studio background.

de_pie_boda.prompt: Same character Jae-gon, same heavy jaw and thinning combed-back hair, the same dark suit with a tie and a white boutonniere on the lapel, standing upright with one arm crooked as if to escort someone, expansive proprietary expression, neutral studio background.

arco.prompt: Same wedding hall, new camera position at the low flowered arch looking back down the short aisle, the arch edge with flowers in the foreground, the rows of chairs receding, same warm even lighting, empty set, no people, no text.

fondo_del_pasillo.prompt: Same wedding hall, new camera position at the very back of the aisle by the entrance doors looking toward the flowered arch, the doorframe edge in the foreground, the rows of chairs on both sides, same warm even lighting, empty set, no people, no text.

ingredients.generation_prompt: Single small worn notebook lying open, cream ruled pages with twenty short handwritten ink lines listed one under another, the paper soft and thumbed at the corner, no readable text, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single old promissory note on yellowed paper folded in three, faint printed ruled boxes and a red seal in one corner, the creases deep from years of folding, no readable text, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single plain legal waiver sheet on cheap white paper with faint printed ruled boxes and a clean red thumb print at the bottom beside the signature line, no readable text, neutral background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single yellow cloth tape measure coiled loosely on a worn wooden table beside a red pincushion stuck with pins, the printed markings faded with use, no readable numbers, neutral background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no text, no logo.

Single old shop key on a loop of worn string lying on a steel counter, the brass dulled and the teeth rounded by thirty years of use, neutral background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no text, no logo.
